prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第120名，近年排名稳定在116–122之间，属全国中上游水平；该校在声誉舆情文件中无显 著负面或正面事件记录；抖音热度排名第95（评价"一般"），综合热度约17.5万，短视频曝光量处于211高校中下游，未见明显报考关注升温信号；历史投档异常记录中无该校断 档信息；食品科学与工程为A-学科（第五轮学科评估），是该校唯一A-及以上学科，与招生专业中的食品科学与工程类、食品科学与工程（拔尖人才培养班）直 接对应，对相关专业报考有一定吸引力。

prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划小幅扩招（+8.3%）与本省物理类考生增加 （+8.4%）基本对冲、声誉热度中性偏冷、农林类院校在湖南的地域偏好一般等因素，在2025年基准44253名基础上预计位次继续小幅后移；预测最低位次约46666名，区间46166–4 7166名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 25854 → 34869 → 61444 (including discontinued majors) → 39143 → 44253, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 9400 positions in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 44253; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 38 in 2021 → 41 in 2022 → 43 in 2023 → 44 in 2024 → 48 in 2025, with a slight annual expansion; the 2026 plan is 52, an increase of 4 (+8.3%) compared to 2025, making competition slightly more intense.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking around 120th in 2026, stable between 116–122 in recent years, at the upper-middle level nationally; no significant negative or positive events recorded in reputation and public opinion files; Douyin popularity ranking 95th (rated 'average'), comprehensive popularity about 175,000, short video exposure at the lower-middle level among 211 universities, no obvious signs of increased application attention; no discontinuation information in historical admission anomaly records; Food Science and Engineering is an A- discipline (fifth round of discipline evaluation), the only A- or above discipline at the university, directly corresponding to the Food Science and Engineering category and Food Science and Engineering (Top Talent Training Class) in the enrollment majors, providing some appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of Computer Science has significantly cooled (down 14.89 in 2024 compared to 2023); Electrical Engineering and Automation, Electronic Information/Communication continue to be highly recommended; the university is characterized by agriculture and forestry, with related majors (Food, Biology, Environment, etc.) mostly falling under the Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials categories, with overall public opinion leaning towards discouragement; the number of Physics Category candidates in the province was 206,000 in 2021 → 320,000 in 2025 → 347,000 in 2026, continuously increasing (2026 vs 2025 +8.4%), intensifying competition; Northeast Agricultural University is located in Harbin, Heilongjiang Province, far from Hunan, with a regional preference disadvantage for cross-province applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the slight expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (+8.3%) which basically offsets the increase in provincial Physics Category candidates (+8.4%), neutral-to-cold reputation and popularity, and the general regional preference for agriculture and forestry universities in Hunan, the ranking is expected to continue to shift slightly backward based on the 2025 baseline of 44253; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 46666, with a range of 46166–47166.

学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; on the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 120th in 2026, with stable rankings in recent years; no significant negative or positive events recorded in reputation and public opinion documents; Douyin popularity ranking 95th (rated 'average'), with comprehensive popularity of about 175,000, short video exposure at the middle-to-lower level among 211 universities; no historical admission anomalies such as gaps; Food Science and Engineering is an A- discipline, but History Category majors (Finance, Business Administration, Land Resource Management, Public Administration) are not directly related to this discipline.
